steps.title: Identify the core problem
steps.content: Data exists on obsolete technologies that can no longer be accessed, yet researchers need it available. This describes a recovery situation, not a quality or clarity issue.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content: ”Salvage” means to recover something valuable from being lost or trapped — capturing the exact action a data-transfer project must take. “Improve,” “simplify,” and “amend” each assume the data itself is flawed or needs enhancement, not extraction from inaccessible storage. That matches choice D — D is correct.
